exhibits.name: State Specific Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: 6 state addenda. CA: release restrictions, arbitration venue, max interest 10%, DFPI registration. HI: filing not endorsement, 7-day delivery. IL: forum/venue void outside IL, franchise law compliance. MN: 90-day termination notice/60-day cure, 180-day non-renewal notice, no general release, no injunctive relief consent. NY: GBL Article 33 protections, franchisor assignment obligations. WI: Fair Dealership Law supersedes inconsistent FA provisions.

exhibits.name: List of State Agencies and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Covers 23 states: CA, CT, FL, GA, HI, IL, IN, IA, KY, LA, ME, MD, MI, MN, NE, NH, NY, NC, ND, OH, OK, OR, RI, SC, SD, TX, UT, VA, WA, WI.

exhibits.name: Table of Contents of Operations Manuals
exhibits.notes: 4 manuals: ProColor Operations Guide (239 pages), ProColor Brand Standards (56 pages), ProColor-CCC Integration Guide (9 pages), Onboarding & Franchise Support Guide (82 pages). Pages 82-85 appear to be scanned images — text extraction was minimal/incomplete.

exhibits.name: List of Current Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 30 franchise locations as of December 31, 2024. States: CA (24), TX (4), MT (1), NC (1). Includes franchisee entity name, address, city, state, zip, business phone. Some entries marked with asterisk (*) — likely new in reporting period.

exhibits.name: List of Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 2 former franchisees listed. These had FA terminated, canceled, not renewed, or otherwise ceased during FY 2024 or had not communicated within 10 weeks of issuance. No confidentiality clauses restrict their discussion of experiences.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by Ernst & Young. Two sets: (1) FY 2024 with 2023 comparatives (pages 90-102), (2) FY 2023 with 2022 comparatives (pages 103-116). Includes balance sheets, statements of comprehensive loss and deficit, statements of cash flows, and notes (10 notes for 2024, 9 for 2023). Key facts: cumulative deficit $4.17M, net loss $1,896 in 2024, revenue $2.57M, parent investment $4.83M.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement, Personal Guaranty, Payment Authorization, and State Specific Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Franchise Agreement (29 sections + schedules, pages 118-157). Personal Guaranty (pages 158-161). Payment Authorization (page 162). State Specific Addenda to FA (CA, HI, IL, MN, NY, WI, pages 163-171). FA covers: grant of franchise, territory, term/renewal (5+5+5 years), initial fee ($20K), monthly franchise fee, marketing fund, gross sales definition, training, insurance, noncompete, termination, transfer, dispute resolution (mediation then arbitration in Minneapolis).

exhibits.name: Electronic Transfer of Funds Authorization
exhibits.notes: EFT authorization form for payment of fees and other amounts. Required for all franchisees.

exhibits.name: Franchisee Questionnaire
exhibits.notes: Standard franchisee questionnaire. Acknowledgment and representation form.

notes: Receipts on pages 180-183 (2 copies). All exhibits present and accounted for per Item 22 listing.
